target.title: fix(ui): forward /reset args in Control UI dispatch to preserve soft-reset intent
target.body:
## Summary

The Control UI slash command dispatcher in `dispatchSlashCommand` ignored the `args` parameter for the `/reset` command, always sending a bare `"/reset"` to the gateway. This caused `/reset soft` (and `/reset soft <message>`) to be silently truncated to `/reset`, executing a hard reset with transcript loss instead of a soft reset.

## Root Cause

In `ui/src/ui/app-chat.ts:1890-1895`, the `case "reset"` branch hardcoded `"/reset"` instead of including `args`:

```typescript
case "reset":
  await sendChatMessageNow(host, "/reset", { ... });  // always bare "/reset"
```

The command parser correctly extracted `args = "soft"` from `/reset soft`, but the dispatcher ignored it.

## Fix

Forward the `args` parameter so `/reset soft` preserves its semantics:

```typescript
case "reset":
  await sendChatMessageNow(host, `/reset${args ? " " + args : ""}`, { ... });
```

This is consistent with how `parseSlashCommand` extracts the command key and args, and how the gateway/server-side `/reset` handler is already designed to accept and interpret args.

## Verification

- **File changed**: `ui/src/ui/app-chat.ts`, 1 line changed
- **Test run**: `node ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts` — 86 tests passed
- **Behavior**: `/reset` → still sends `/reset` (no args, no change); `/reset soft` → now correctly sends `/reset soft`; `/reset soft hello` → now correctly sends `/reset soft hello`

Fixes #91316

### Real behavior proof
- **Behavior addressed**: Control UI /reset soft truncated to bare /reset, args silently dropped
- **Real environment tested**: Linux Node 24 x64
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch**:
  ```console
  $ node ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts
  ```
- **Evidence after fix**:
  ```console
  $ node ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts
   ✓ ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts (86 tests) 1.23s
   Test Files  1 passed (1)
        Tests  86 passed (86)
  ```
- **Observed result after fix**: All 86 tests pass. The `/reset` case in `dispatchSlashCommand` now constructs the message string from the command key and args, preserving soft-reset intent when args are present.
- **What was not tested**: Live e2e with actual Control UI → Gateway communication (requires running openclaw instance with Telemetry/Gateway setup)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
